race.comment: KAMAROOKA (5) has a moderate winning strike-rate but performed well last time at Echuca, finishing third and only 1.2 lengths from the winner at the end of 1612m. Looks well placed so expect a big run this time. TUDAYA (3) is fitter for two runs back from a spell, the latest last Saturday at Werribee when fourth, beaten 1.2 lengths over 1625m. This looks a suitable progression. DON'TCALLMECHAMP (4) improved sharply last time out to score by one length over 1590m at Wodonga three weeks ago. That was 52 grade, so up in class here, but there aren't an abundance of horses with strong 56 form in this. BLONDE SUSPECT (9) was poor last start, but that was 1400m, so better suited this trip and stable warrants respect on the home deck. Another local, SHAL EXCEED (6), made late ground and finished 6 lengths seventh over 1400m at Mildura last start, which was an improvement on his 11th at Bendigo the run before and he draws well.
